_comment: Authoritative record of your macropad layout (6 keys + 1 knob). The device cannot report its own assignments, so THIS FILE is your source of truth. Edit it, then run:  python macropad.py apply layout.json  to write every entry to the device. Use --dry-run to preview first. Empty 'keys' entries are skipped (left untouched on the device).

3.note: Windows Emoji picker (Win+.) - reprogram via Macro Studio 'Program Key on Device' to make it a macro key

5.note: Move active window to other monitor (Win+Shift+Right; with 2 screens Left toggles the same)
